title: The Adventures Of Hooman
description:
A 1-2 hour hand drawn comedy sci fi adventure. Make all the bad decisions... Hooman won't mind.

You are Hooman. You are an android. You are not the problem.Hooman is the true hero the universe needs. He knows it, and will carve a path that shows everyone the truth.

A Crew That Needs YouBased on your crew evaluations, it's clear that the crew cannot function without you. Their actions and inactions speak the loudest and regardless of the choices you choose it's clear the crew couldn't have made it without you.

It's important to make sure the crew knows where they stand and how they can improve. Hooman keeps track and regularly updates his Codex to keep the crew performing at peak efficiency.

Make Your ChoicesChoices determine the fate of the crew. If they die, well that's their fault for being in the situations you tried to steer them away from. But when presented a choice, you know the right thing to do.
description_short: A sci-fi comedy graphic novel where you play Hooman, an android too conceited to be scared and too lucky to die. Your crew is going to die but they could have avoided an untimely death if they had only listened to you. You are not the problem.
